data.html_notes:
Already in progress from shared repos
We are upgrading fastify to v5, and need to make sure all fastify plug ins are updated accordingly. Here is an example of one plugin that needed to update: https://github.com/tetherto/svc-facs-httpd/pull/8 "@fastify/static": "^6.10.2", —→ "@fastify/static": "^8.3.0", Check the repos, both internal and rumble, for what needs updating. Assigned to Alex but can be passed to Usman if needed
data.name: Rumble - Update Fastify plug ins
data.notes:
Already in progress from shared repos

----------------------------------------



We are upgrading fastify to v5, and need to make sure all fastify plug ins are updated accordingly.

Here is an example of one plugin that needed to update:
https://github.com/tetherto/svc-facs-httpd/pull/8

"@fastify/static": "^6.10.2", —→  "@fastify/static": "^8.3.0",

Check the repos, both internal and rumble, for what needs updating.

Assigned to Alex but can be passed to Usman if needed
